result.stdout:
Description:
  Generating Manifest: v1.0.0+b2b15fb20ba2b7d8a25830146bd3a46059e67c32

Usage:
  EAVFW.Extensions.Manifest.ManifestEnricherTool [command] [options]

Options:
  --path <path> (REQUIRED)                     The path
  --customizationprefix <customizationprefix>  The prefix
  --version                                    Show version information
  -?, -h, --help                               Show help and usage information

Commands:
  install <PackageName>  installs a manifest extesion
  sql <ProjectPath>      generalte sql files [default: .]
  manifest               Work with the manifest
  certs                  generalte certs files
  binary <string>        Work with binary gunzipped data used in EAVFW
  docs                   Work with documentation
  gpt                    ChatGPT EAVFW Developer

result.stdout:
Description:
  Work with binary gunzipped data used in EAVFW

Usage:
  EAVFW.Extensions.Manifest.ManifestEnricherTool binary <string> [options]

Arguments:
  <string>  Content to operate on

Options:
  -u, --unzip         Unzip hex formatted binary stirng ot string
  -z, --zip           Zip string to hex formatted binary string
  -p, --pretty-print  Pretty print output
  -o, --output <o>    Output path - defaults to outputting in the terminal
  -?, -h, --help      Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description: Extract documentation source Usage: EAVFW.Extensions.Manifest.ManifestEnricherTool docs extract [options] Options: -a, --assembly Path for the assembly -gm, --generated-manifest Path for the enriched manifest -p, --probing-pattern

Path pattern used to probe for assemblies, supporting glob patterns -o, --output Output directory for genreated documentation source files -t, --target What kind of documentation source should be extracted -d, --debug Enable debug output -?, -h, --help Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  installs a manifest extesion

Usage:
  EAVFW.Extensions.Manifest.ManifestEnricherTool install <PackageName> [options]

Arguments:
  <PackageName>  The package to install, a valid nuget package

Options:
  -v, --version <version>  The version to install
  ShortName <ShortName>    If provided, the installed extension is not merged in but added as a seperate module
  -?, -h, --help           Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  generalte sql files

Usage:
  EAVFW.Extensions.Manifest.ManifestEnricherTool sql [<ProjectPath>] [command] [options]

Arguments:
  <ProjectPath>  The project path to EAV Model Project [default: .]

Options:
  OutputFile, -o <OutputFile>          The output sql script for database migrations [default: obj/dbinit/init.sql]
  GeneratePermissions                  Should permissions be generated for each entity [default: True]
  SystemUserEntity <SystemUserEntity>  The system user entity used to popuplate a system administrator account [default: SystemUsers]
  -?, -h, --help                       Show help and usage information


Commands:
  apply
  add-user
